form.formComment: Returns from a 45-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Kempton Park All Weather on March 2 over 1400m, nose behind Lady Dora Mae with 55.5kg at $7.50. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on January 19 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Up The Agenda with 58kg at $13. In form and will be hard to beat.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fourth of 9 at Redcar October 17 over 1600m, 10 len behind Beyond The Bar with 57kg at $13. On debut second of 10 at Carlisle September 9 over 1200m, 4 len behind Isle Of Fernandez with 56kg at $21. Certainly one to consider.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at Beverley September 17 over 1700m, soft track; 19 len behind Dunkeld Dreamer with 61kg at $13. form.formComment: Resuming after six months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign sixth of 9 at Nottingham October 15 over 1700m, 8 len behind Assaranca with 59.5kg at $5. form.formComment: Last start 6th of 9 at Newcastle All Weather on March 21 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Smartanck carrying 61kg at $4.20. form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 9 at Newcastle All Weather on March 21 over 1600m, 0.5 len behind Smartanck carrying 60kg at $6.
